briefdescription.para: Create a new xmlTextWriter structure using an xmlOutputBuffer NOTE: the out parameter will be deallocated when the writer is closed (if the call succeed.)

simplesect.para: the new xmlTextWriter or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create a new xmlTextWriter structure with uri as output.

parameterdescription.para: the URI of the resource for the output

simplesect.para: the new xmlTextWriter or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create a new xmlTextWriter structure with buf as output TODO: handle compression.

simplesect.para: the new xmlTextWriter or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create a new xmlTextWriter structure with ctxt as output NOTE: the ctxt context will be freed with the resulting writer (if the call succeeds).

parameterdescription.para: xmlParserCtxt to hold the new XML document tree

simplesect.para: the new xmlTextWriter or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create a new xmlTextWriter structure with doc as output.

parameterdescription.para: address of a xmlDoc to hold the new XML document tree

simplesect.para: the new xmlTextWriter or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create a new xmlTextWriter structure with doc as output starting at node

simplesect.para: the new xmlTextWriter or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Deallocate all the resources associated to the writer.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlTextWriter *writer, const char *version, const char *encoding, const char *standalone)
memberdef.name: xmlTextWriterStartDocument

parameterdescription.para: the xml version ("1.0") or NULL for default ("1.0")
the encoding or NULL for default

simplesect.para: the bytes written (may be 0 because of buffering) or -1 in case of error

detaileddescription.para: All open elements are closed, and the content is flushed to the output.

simplesect.para: the bytes written or -1 in case of error
the bytes written (may be 0 because of buffering) or -1 in case of error

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlTextWriter *writer, const char *data, int start, int len)
memberdef.name: xmlTextWriterWriteBase64

briefdescription.para: Write an base64 encoded xml text.

detaileddescription.para:
writer
the xmlTextWriter
data
binary data
start
the position within the data of the first byte to encode
len
the number of bytes to encode
the bytes written (may be 0 because of buffering) or -1 in case of error
NOTE: No safety check is done on the length of data. This check is something that should happen outside of this call, the caller should know better the actual data and if it's reaching the end of the buffer or not.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlTextWriter *writer, const char *data, int start, int len)
memberdef.name: xmlTextWriterWriteBinHex

briefdescription.para: Write a BinHex encoded xml text.

parameterdescription.para: the position within the data of the first byte to encode
the number of bytes to encode

simplesect.para: the bytes written (may be 0 because of buffering) or -1 in case of error
the bytes written (may be 0 because of buffering) or -1 in case of error

the name of the DTD entity

the system identifier, which is the URI of the DTD

memberdef.name: xmlTextWriterWriteDTDNotation

parameterdescription.para: the name of the xml notation
the public identifier, which is an alternative to the system identifier
the system identifier, which is the URI of the DTD

simplesect.para: the bytes written (may be 0 because of buffering) or -1 in case of error

detaileddescription.para: indent = 0 do not indentation. indent > 0 do indentation.

simplesect.para: -1 on error or 0 otherwise.
-1 on error or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Set the character used for quoting attributes.

simplesect.para: -1 on error or 0 otherwise.
the bytes written (may be 0 because of buffering) or -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Flushes and closes the output buffer.

simplesect.para: an xmlParserErrors code.
